message:
fix(tui): theme editor clippy fixes, intercept pass-through, and 18 new tests (2noh9.4.5)

Fix collapsible-if warnings, add ThemeEditor message pass-through in
modal intercept so direct messages reach handlers, fix Ctrl+Shift+T
key mapping (add !shift guard to Ctrl+T → ThemeToggled), add raw
string fix for hex colors in tests. Also includes Sources management
scaffolding from concurrent 2noh9.4.9 work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -513,11 +513,11 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","title":"Task: Input macro recording + playback (user automation + reproducible bug reports)","description":"## Goal
Leverage `ftui_runtime::input_macro` to let users:
- record a sequence of inputs (keys/mouse) while using the TUI
- save macros to a file under the cass data dir
- replay a macro deterministically

## Use Cases
- Reproduce a UI bug reliably.
- Create personal workflows: apply filters, run searches, export.

## CLI/UX
- Interactive:
  - key to start/stop recording (must be in help/palette)
  - toast showing recording state
- CLI flags:
  - `cass tui --play-macro <path>`
  - `cass tui --record-macro <path>` (non-interactive automation)

## Tests
- Unit tests for macro serialization format.
- Simulation test: record events, replay, assert resulting model state.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Macro playback yields identical final state across runs (deterministic).
- Macro files redact sensitive paths if required (configurable).","notes":"Recording implemented: --record-macro saves JSONL with key/modifier/timing data. Live playback deferred (needs ftui event injection API). Macro files can be replayed in tests via ProgramSimulator. 6 unit tests + PTY e2e test. Commit cc7ee6a.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T12:01:43.063893847Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T12:01:43.063806043Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["automation","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.667396004Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:31:45.293981872Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","title":"Task: Render trace + time-travel capture (record frames/events; attach to failures; inspector view)","description":"## Goal
Make the TUI *debuggable* and *testable* at kernel level by leveraging ftui's tracing and harness tooling:
- record render traces (diff stats, timings)
- optionally record compressed frame snapshots for time-travel inspection
- optionally record asciicast output for sharing

## CLI/Config
- `cass tui --trace-render <path>`: record render trace
- `cass tui --trace-events <path>`: record event stream
- optional `cass tui --trace-bundle <dir>` to write a bug-report bundle:
  - render trace
  - event macro
  - tui_state.json
  - system capabilities snapshot

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::render_trace` and/or `ftui_harness::time_travel` data formats.
- Provide a built-in inspector screen that can replay a trace bundle inside cass itself.

## Tests
- In CI, on TUI test failures, automatically write a trace bundle to `test-results/`.
- Unit tests that trace writers are gated behind flags and do not affect normal perf.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A flaky UI bug becomes reproducible from a trace bundle.
- Trace bundle contains enough context to debug without rerunning on the original machine.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983788589Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:09:07.983763112Z","close_reason":"Implemented render trace + time-travel capture: new src/ui/trace.rs module with TraceWriter (JSONL frame/event recording), FrameRecord/EventRecord types, SystemInfo capture, trace bundle writer/reader. CLI flags: --trace-render PATH, --trace-events PATH, --trace-bundle DIR. Integrated with both ftui interactive and headless entry points. 7 unit tests + 2 integration tests (trace JSONL output, bundle directory creation). All 160+ tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:17.962827401Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.244527139Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:03.858616009Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","title":"Task: Built-in UI inspector + debug overlays (layout, hit regions, frame budgets, diff stats)","description":"## Goal
Expose ftui's introspection capabilities directly in cass for both developers and power users.

## Features
- Toggleable inspector overlay showing:
  - widget tree / layout bounds
  - focus state
  - hit-test regions
  - frame timing and diff size
  - degradation state (essential-only vs full)
- Optional VOI/performance overlays if useful.

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::inspector` / `layout_debugger` / debug overlay widgets.
- Must be fully optional and off by default.

## Tests
- Snapshot tests with overlay enabled.
- Unit tests that overlay does not affect core interactions when disabled.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Overlay is the fastest way to debug a weird layout/selection issue.
- Overlay never crashes in narrow terminals (auto-disable or simplify).","notes":"AzureElk claiming: UI inspector + debug overlays","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T13:49:25.857018284Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T13:49:25.856996604Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","performance","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.536040241Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:18.814600147Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:19.527765696Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","title":"Task: Interactive theme editor (preview, export/import theme config, accessibility checks)","description":"## Goal
Turn cass theming from a fixed preset list into a power-user feature:
- interactive theme editor screen
- live preview across core panes
- export/import theme config file
- built-in contrast/a11y checks (warn when below thresholds)

## Notes
- Use `ftui_style::ThemeBuilder` for incremental edits.
- Theme config should be stored under data dir and be additive/versioned.

## Tests
- Unit tests for theme serialization/deserialization.
- Snapshot tests for a custom theme.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can create a theme that works in both truecolor and 16-color fallback.
- High-contrast mode remains one-keystroke away.","notes":"Implemented theme-config foundations in src/ui/style_system.rs: versioned ThemeConfig/ThemeColorOverrides schema, JSON import/export helpers, override validation + typed errors, ThemeBuilder-based additive overrides, and ThemeContrastReport diagnostics (WCAG thresholds). Added tests for serde roundtrip, snapshot JSON stability, invalid color rejection, ANSI16 downgrade, low-contrast detection, and file roundtrip. Validation currently blocked by unrelated workspace compile failures in src/ui/app.rs saved-views branch and analytics churn; rustfmt --check src/ui/style_system.rs passes.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:30:21.444384538Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","style","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.369591892Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.091556033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","title":"Task: Interactive theme editor (preview, export/import theme config, accessibility checks)","description":"## Goal

## Notes

Committed ec93a61.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T14:22:22.885865422Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T14:22:22.885772850Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","style","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.369591892Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.091556033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:32:38.378784714Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.6","title":"Task: Saved views manager UX (browse/rename/delete slots, toast confirmations, palette integration)","description":"## Goal
Make saved views a first-class feature:
- browse saved slots in a dedicated modal
- rename slots (human labels)
- delete/clear slots
- load/save via keyboard shortcuts remain

## Notes
- Must preserve existing slot shortcuts for parity.
- Use `ftui-widgets` table/list + modal.

## Tests
- Unit tests for save/load/rename/clear logic.
- Snapshot test for saved views modal with many entries.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:17.205876247Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:42:31.469947540Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T05:42:31.469920570Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.652013136Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:19.932185948Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:17.205876247Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.7","title":"Task: Asciicast recording for TUI sessions (shareable demos + bug repro artifacts)","description":"## Goal
Allow recording interactive sessions as asciicast (ttyrec-like) for:
- sharing a demo of cass
- attaching a bug report

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui_runtime::{AsciicastRecorder, AsciicastWriter}`.
- Recording must be opt-in (flag or toggle).

## CLI
- `cass tui --asciicast <path>`

## Tests
- E2E: run headless/simulated session with asciicast enabled and assert file created.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Asciicast playback shows the UI correctly and does not leak secrets by default (redaction policy documented).","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:33.233901969Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T09:48:00.645059129Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T09:48:00.645025466Z","close_reason":"Completed via commit c12cb74: asciicast v2 recording with --asciicast flag, security-default input exclusion, E2E test verifying file creation.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["debug","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:20.500063302Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:20.227593039Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:33.233901969Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","title":"Task: Adaptive rendering/perf budgets (degradation levels, auto-disable animation, diff strategy tuning)","description":"## Goal
Use ftui's degradation + evidence/telemetry systems to keep cass smooth and flicker-free under load.

## Features
- Degradation levels:
  - full styling
  - reduced decorative
  - essential-only
- Auto-disable animations when FPS drops below threshold.
- Diff strategy tuning to minimize terminal I/O.

## Implementation Notes
- Use `Frame.degradation` hints and widgets' essential/decorative split.
- Consider `ftui_runtime::RuntimeDiffConfig` and diff strategy selection.

## Tests
- Harness tests:
  - flicker detection
  - determinism under repeated renders
- Benchmark that measures diff size and render time on large result sets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- On large datasets, UI stays responsive.
- When under budget, UI degrades gracefully (still functional).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:49.996438964Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T03:41:53.983621860Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T03:41:53.983598456Z","close_reason":"Implemented adaptive rendering with FrameBudgetConfig, degradation-aware view(), Bayesian diff strategy, 12 new tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:20.997439094Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:20.760102013Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:34:49.996438964Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","title":"Task: In-TUI sources management (list sources, sync status, run doctor/sync actions)","description":"## Goal
Make multi-machine sources manageable without leaving the TUI:
- list configured sources and their last sync/index status
- show errors (SSH unreachable, permission denied)
- allow triggering:
  - `sources sync` (non-destructive, additive-only)
  - `sources doctor`

## Notes
- This should orchestrate existing CLI logic, not reimplement SSH.
- Must be careful with long-running operations: show progress and keep UI responsive.

## Tests
- Integration test using a fake/local source config to ensure UI can render the sources list.
- Simulation test: trigger sync action and assert Cmd emitted.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can understand and fix source configuration issues from within the TUI.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:35:53.024926916Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:43:49.936816757Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","sources","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.484135689Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.237294921Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:35:53.024926916Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","title":"Task: In-TUI sources management (list sources, sync status, run doctor/sync actions)","description":"## Goal
Make multi-machine sources manageable without leaving the TUI:
- list configured sources and their last sync/index status
- show errors (SSH unreachable, permission denied)
- allow triggering:
  - `sources sync` (non-destructive, additive-only)
  - `sources doctor`

## Notes
- This should orchestrate existing CLI logic, not reimplement SSH.
- Must be careful with long-running operations: show progress and keep UI responsive.

## Tests
- Integration test using a fake/local source config to ensure UI can render the sources list.
- Simulation test: trigger sync action and assert Cmd emitted.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can understand and fix source configuration issues from within the TUI.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:35:53.024926916Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T14:23:16.511230868Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","sources","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.484135689Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:21.237294921Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.9","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:35:53.024926916Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","title":"Epic: Testing + QA for ftui TUI (unit, snapshot/golden, PTY e2e, performance, logging artifacts)","description":"## Goal
Build a test suite that makes the ftui TUI rewrite safe:
- state transitions unit-tested
- rendering snapshotted/golden-tested
- terminal correctness validated via PTY e2e
- performance budgets enforced
- failures emit rich, structured logs and trace bundles

## Why
TUIs are notoriously hard to test; ftui provides harness tools that we must adopt to get deterministic confidence.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:11.877179017Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T13:06:13.875775727Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T13:06:13.875757352Z","close_reason":"All children completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","qa","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:11.877179017Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","title":"Task: Add ftui-harness snapshot infrastructure to cass (goldens, BLESS workflow, diff output)","description":"## Goal
Adopt `ftui-harness` for UI snapshot/golden testing in cass.

## Deliverables
- `ftui-harness` dev-dependency.
- A standard snapshot test helper that:
  - renders a view into a `ftui_render::Buffer`
  - asserts snapshot with helpful diffs
  - supports `BLESS=1` to update snapshots
- Snapshot organization and naming conventions aligned with existing `tests/` style.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Running `BLESS=1 cargo test -p coding-agent-search` updates/creates snapshots.
- Snapshot diffs are readable and point at the failing view/state.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:30.387881823Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:08:36.886783754Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:08:36.886753027Z","close_reason":"Completed: added ftui-harness dev-dependency, shared snapshot helpers, baseline snapshot tests and golden files","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:38.791293377Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:30.387881823Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","title":"Task: Migrate existing Ratatui UI tests to ftui equivalents (ui_snap.rs, tui.rs internal tests)","description":"## Goal
Replace Ratatui-specific tests with ftui-based tests so CI continues to validate UI behavior after the migration.

## Inventory (current)
- `tests/ui_snap.rs` uses `ratatui::style::{Color, Modifier}` and ThemePalette.
- `src/ui/tui.rs` includes tests using `ratatui::backend::TestBackend`.

## Deliverables
- Tests rewritten to use:
  - `ftui_style` color/style types
  - `ftui_render::Buffer` for rendering
  - `ftui-harness` for snapshots
- Any remaining style invariants ported (highlight bg present, stripe contrast, etc.).

## Acceptance Criteria
- No test depends on Ratatui once migration is complete.
- Test coverage for theming/highlighting/striping is preserved or improved.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:52.118034540Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:25:09.429384002Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:25:09.429338437Z","close_reason":"Migrated external test files (ui_snap.rs, ui_components.rs, regression_behavioral.rs) to import Color/Modifier/Style/Buffer/Rect/etc from the crate's own re-exports instead of ratatui directly. Added pub use re-exports in theme.rs and widgets.rs. All 50 ui_snap tests + 54 ftui_harness tests pass. Internal tui.rs rendering tests remain ratatui-based since the module itself uses ratatui and will be deleted with 2noh9.6.1.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","migration","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.242978282Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:37:52.118034540Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:39.015730760Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","title":"Task: Final UI polish pass (style spec compliance, a11y, motion budgets, terminal degradation)","description":"## Goal
Do the final pass that turns a working UI into a *world-class* UI.

## Checklist
- Style spec compliance:
  - consistent spacing
  - consistent role coloring
  - readable empty states
  - tasteful motion (if enabled)
- Accessibility:
  - contrast levels
  - a11y patterns
  - no-color mode
- Degraded terminals:
  - no glyph icons
  - plain borders
  - no gradients

## Acceptance Criteria
- The UI looks intentional and premium in common terminals.
- Nothing breaks in 80x24.
- No flicker.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979381932Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979359260Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","polish","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.233622643Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.549640154Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.846967196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","title":"Phase 3C: Results list with VirtualizedList","description":"Replace the current pane rendering (manual iteration over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors) with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList. VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets using a Fenwick-tree-based height predictor and viewport windowing. Each result item renders as a custom widget with: (1) Agent icon/color badge (using agent accent from theme), (2) Source path (truncated with ellipsis), (3) Line number, (4) Timestamp (relative: 2h ago, yesterday, etc), (5) Preview snippet (up to 3 lines with match highlighting), (6) Multi-open queue indicator (checkmark when queued). Register hit regions per item for click selection. Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through the VirtualizedListState. The virtualization means we can display 100,000+ results without lag -- currently the TUI rebuilds all pane widgets on every frame even if only a few are visible.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:18:26.544264400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400259784Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400237052Z","close_reason":"Merged into 2noh9.3.4 (Results list). VirtualizedList, Fenwick-tree height predictor, O(1) viewport windowing details merged.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1cyg3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:56.536119790Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1p0wb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:53.887793748Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
